PhaseTime.description: One phase's timing in a PerfReport. Serialized as `{ name, us }` so consumers can index into a phase by name without tuple-position guessing.

description: Single-compile perf report. Fields match the S71 spec format.

compiled_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at the moment compile started. e.g. "2026-05-03T12:45:00Z".

input_bytes.description: Bytes of input JSON consumed by `compile()`.

node_count.description: Number of nodes in the lowered CompilerIr.

phases.description: Per-phase microseconds. Insertion-ordered; iterating yields phases in the order they ran.

total_us.description: Total `compile()` wall time, microseconds. Sum of phases plus a small overhead for the bookkeeping itself.

title: PerfReport
